title: Cypilot Kit Manifest (manifest.toml)
description: Schema for the declarative kit installation manifest. When present in a kit package root, governs installation and update: only declared resources are installed, each at its declared (or user-overridden) path.

manifest.description: Manifest metadata: version, kit root, global user-modifiable flag.

resources.description: Declared kit resources. Each resource has an identifier, source path, default destination, type, and user-modifiable flag.

root.description: Base directory for all resources. Supports template variables {cypilot_path} and {slug}. Default: '{cypilot_path}/config/kits/{slug}'.

user_modifiable.description: If true, the user may override the kit root directory during installation.

id.description: Unique resource identifier. Used as a template variable {id} in kit files and as the key in core.toml [kits.<slug>.resources].

source.description: Path to the resource in the kit package (relative to kit root). Must exist in the kit source.

default_path.description: Default destination path (relative to kit root in the project). Used when user_modifiable is false or when user accepts the default.

type.description: Resource type: 'file' for single files, 'directory' for directory trees.

user_modifiable.description: If true, the user is prompted for the destination path during installation.
